commit.message:
feat: personal schedule bookmarks TASK-5.2

- Add BookmarksContext with optimistic UI and offline localStorage fallback
- Sync offline bookmarks to API on login
- Add BookmarkButton component (Bookmark/BookmarkCheck icon, stopPropagation)
- Overlay BookmarkButton on each SessionCard in SchedulePage
- MySchedulePage: show track name+colour, rename Cancel → Remove from schedule
- Wrap app in BookmarksProvider inside QueryClientProvider

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: remove local keyword outside function in sync script (TASK-18)

Also adds body_file cleanup after loop iteration.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: real-time seat availability via SignalR TASK-5.3

- Add SessionHub with JoinSession/LeaveSession group methods
- Register SignalR and map /hubs/session in Program.cs
- Update CORS to AllowCredentials for WebSocket negotiation
- Broadcast SeatsUpdated after register and cancel in RegistrationsController
- Add @microsoft/signalr and useSessionSeats hook in frontend
- Show pulsing LIVE badge when SignalR is connected
- Proxy /hubs with ws:true in vite.config.ts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use --body-file in sync script to handle multiline issue bodies (TASK-18)

gh issue create/edit fails under set -e when --body contains newlines.
Fix: write body to mktemp file, use --body-file, capture stderr for
meaningful warnings instead of silent failure.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: GitHub Actions expert agent + CI monitoring in ralph loop (TASK-17)

- .github/agents/github-actions-expert.md: new agent with CI/CD expertise
- orchestrator ralph loop: checkCIAndFileBugs() polls gh run list each cycle,
  deduplicates by run ID, auto-files bug tasks labeled bug,ci,infrastructure
- labelToAgent updated: ci/devops/workflow → github-actions-expert

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: suppress all Invoke-MgGraphRequest pipeline leaks

Added | Out-Null to 5 unsuppressed Invoke-MgGraphRequest calls:
- Grant-Win32AppAssignment POST (caused deploy count inflation)
- Invoke-BlobRenewal POST
- New-ProactiveRemediation assign POST
- Invoke-UploadWin32Lob commit file POST
- Invoke-UploadWin32Lob commit app PATCH

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Speaker detail: name, company, bio, Twitter/LinkedIn links, sessions list
- Sessions link to /sessions/:id (schedule)

accidentally dropped when gitPush/cmdPush were inserted above cmdBug.

design: GitHub Issues sync schema TASK-12

feat: Swagger UI + deployment guide TASK-6.3

- Add Swashbuckle.AspNetCore 7.3.1 (replaces Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi)
- Enable XML doc generation in csproj
- Configure SwaggerGen with JWT Bearer security in Program.cs
- Swagger UI served at /swagger in development

feat: schedule view UI TASK-3.3

- Add api.sessions.listByConference() for /conferences/:id/sessions
- Implement full SchedulePage with day tabs, track filter bar, time-grid
- Desktop CSS grid (time column + track columns), mobile stacked layout
- SessionCard: title, speakers, room, seats, LevelBadge, duration
- Empty slots shown as dashed placeholders
- Multi-conference selector dropdown

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix critical bugs, remove dead code, and pass all 57 tests

Bug fixes:
- Fix Pester PassThru config so test failures actually break the build
- Fix pipeline output leaks (Start/Stop-Transcript, Connect-MgGraph)
- Fix Grant-Win32AppAssignment handling multiple app matches
- Fix Invoke-UploadWin32Lob missing return value and error swallowing
- Fix undefined variables ($Tag/$Command) in Uninstall/Update-WinGetPackage
- Fix Write-Host -Message invalid syntax in Install-WingetIfNeeded
- Fix cross-platform temp path (use GetTempPath() instead of $env:TEMP)

Code quality (DRY/KISS):
- Remove dead MSI parameter set and File/Registry detection rules
- DRY up script generation templates (shared Write-Log function)
- Propagate errors instead of silently swallowing them
- Reduce sleep from 10s to 2s for file system pause

Test fixes:
- Fix InModuleScope scoping for private function mocks
- Fix CoreFunctions discovery-phase module import
- Fix URL-encoded assertion for single quote escaping
- Add tests: pipeline leak, Get-Win32AppBody, Find-WinGetPackage mock
- All 57 tests pass (was 53 passed, 1 failed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: code quality cleanup, bug fixes, deploy workflow

Critical bug fixes:
- Fix Update-WinGetPackage using 'Install' instead of 'Upgrade' command
- Fix unreachable cleanup code after return in Get-IntuneWinXML/Get-IntuneWinFile
- Remove duplicate Filter parameter block in Install-WinGetPackage
- Replace undefined Write-LogEntry with Write-Verbose
- Remove leftover Wait-Debugger call from production code

Dead code removal:
- Remove unused Get-DefaultReturnCode (singular duplicate)
- Remove unused New-ReturnCode function
- Remove unused WinGetSource.Add() and WinGetPackage.Add() methods
- Remove over-engineered class constructors
- Remove duplicate $azureStorageUploadChunkSizeInMb from Win32AppHelpers.ps1
- Remove unused $failedState/$timedOutState variables in Wait-FileProcessing
- Remove stale developer comments

DRY/KISS/no-nesting cleanup:
- Centralize publisher description suffix as $script:PublisherTag
- Deduplicate Write-Verbose lines in Invoke-UploadWin32Lob
- Simplify Get-DefaultReturnCodes to inline hashtables
- Flatten Connect-ToGraph with guard clauses (no-nesting)
- Simplify Get-IntuneApplication with early returns
- Replace array += with List<T> in Get-PopularAppsByCategory

Module manifest sync:
- Add Invoke-PopularAppsDeployment to psd1 FunctionsToExport
- Align all exports between psm1 and psd1

New features:
- Add deploy.yml workflow_dispatch for deploying apps to Intune
- Add CoreFunctions.Tests.ps1 with tests for cleaned-up functions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Restore the HA direct MFA/TOTP flow by preserving the CSRF token across the second-step login form, add regression coverage, and update release notes.

commit.message:
docs: Add Orchestrator quick start guide

Quick reference for common orchestrator commands and workflows.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Add Orchestrator Agent for intelligent task assignment

Implements intelligent task-to-agent assignment system with full monitoring:

Phase 1 - Metadata Integration:
  - Custom markdown sections for assigned_agent and agent_instructions
  - Stores assignments in .orchestrator-metadata.json
  - Extends task metadata without modifying core backlog.md

Phase 2 - Orchestrator Core Logic:
  - Multi-dimensional scoring algorithm (keywords, specialties, complexity, task type)
  - Analyzes task properties and recommends best-fit agent
  - Provides confidence scores and alternative recommendations
  - Maintains complete assignment history

Phase 3 - CLI Integration:
  - 'orchestrator assign' - intelligent agent recommendation
  - 'orchestrator bulk-assign' - auto-assign all pending tasks
  - 'orchestrator status' - show assignments and history
  - 'orchestrator show' - detailed task analysis with scoring
  - 'orchestrator agents' - list agent profiles and specialties

Phase 4 - Agent Coordination:
  - ORCHESTRATOR.md agent instructions for Claude/Gemini
  - Integration with backlog.md CLI
  - Clear decision framework for agent selection
  - Transparent scoring rationale

Phase 5 - Monitoring & Feedback:
  - 'orchestrator-monitor scan' - detect status changes & stalled tasks
  - 'orchestrator-monitor metrics' - agent performance tracking
  - 'orchestrator-monitor stalled' - find tasks not progressing
  - 'orchestrator-monitor suggest' - reassignment recommendations

Supported Agents:
  - explore: Research, understanding, investigation (low-to-medium complexity)
  - task: Building, testing, execution (medium complexity)
  - code-review: Code quality, security validation (medium complexity)
  - general-purpose: Complex workflows, refactoring (high complexity)

Files Added:
  - src/orchestrator.js - Core assignment logic
  - src/orchestrator-cli.js - CLI for task assignment
  - src/orchestrator-monitor.js - Progress tracking engine
  - src/orchestrator-monitor-cli.js - CLI for monitoring
  - .github/ORCHESTRATOR.md - Agent instructions
  - ORCHESTRATOR.md - Complete documentation
  - package.json - npm scripts and bin configs
  - Updated README.md - Quick start guide
  - Updated .github/copilot-instructions.md - Orchestrator section

Metadata Files:
  - backlog/.orchestrator-metadata.json (gitignored)
  - backlog/.orchestrator-monitor.json (gitignored)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor(next): split next.ts into next/ subdirectory

Split the 3,384-line src/client/next.ts into four focused files
under src/client/next/:

- helpers.ts: shared internal utilities (isRecord, hasFunctionRefCandidate,
  readMember, readFunctionRef, hasPluginFunctionRefs, ConvexRouteFunctionRef)
- plugins.ts: plugin types and factories (NextAuthApiPlugin,
  NextAuthApiPluginFactory, coreApiPlugin, pluginApiPlugin, etc.)
- client.ts: client types and factories (NextAuthClientOptions,
  createNextAuthClient, createNextReactAuthClient, etc.)
- index.ts: server-side code (request helpers, cookie/OAuth helpers,
  server factories) + re-exports from plugins.ts and client.ts

Update package.json exports from ./src/client/next.ts to
./src/client/next/index.ts (and dist equivalents).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Apply suggestions from code review

- Move tanstack-start-client-plugins.ts → tanstack-start/client-plugins.ts
- Rename tanstack-start-plugin-meta.ts → plugin-meta.ts (shared)
- Rename tanstack-start-identity-jwt.ts → identity-jwt.ts (shared)
- Update all import paths in moved files, next.ts, tests, and package.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add multiplayer memory game

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve 4x-count performance benchmark (#8068)

* Initial plan

* Optimize count query performance in RxDB core

- Optimize now() to use Math.round instead of parseFloat(toFixed())
- Skip mapDocumentsDataToCacheDocs for count queries in RxQuerySingleResult
- Skip sort computation for count queries in normalizeMangoQuery
- Skip isFindOneByIdQuery check for count queries
- Use Date.now() instead of now() for _creationTime and _lastEnsureEqual

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* Optimize _ensureEqual to avoid async wrapper when awaitBeforeReads is empty

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

* Use counter instead of Date.now() for _lastEnsureEqual

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat(ui): redesign device cards, header, toolbar — HA/MA aligned

Complete visual overhaul of the web interface:

- Device cards: new layout with speaker icon, SVG chip indicators
  (BT rune, MA house logo, chain-link sync), single-row transport
  controls + volume slider, now-playing section with album art
- Header: user icon + username, exit-door sign-out icon, BT/MA SVG
  health indicator pills
- Toolbar: split into Filter Bar (group/adapter/status filters +
  grid/list view toggle) and Action Bar (select-all, group volume,
  mute/pause/reconnect/release)
- All Unicode/emoji icons replaced with consistent MDI-style SVGs
- Volume slider: MA-style colored track fill via --slider-fill CSS var
- New features: grid/list toggle, adapter filter, status filter,
  bulk reconnect/release actions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: professional README for public repository

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: fallback through all LRC candidates on fetch failure

Previously, only the first synced candidate was tried. If its LRC file
was missing (404) or had invalid path chars like null bytes (400), the
entire repo was skipped.

Now iterates all candidates (synced first, preserving order) until one
succeeds. Skips paths containing null bytes. Only gives up when all
candidates fail.

Recovers ~24% of repos that were previously lost.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: k6 API test suite with Docker Compose for all endpoints

- Add tests/api/api_test.js: k6 script covering all ~65 API endpoints
  with setup/teardown, 100% check pass rate, <10% request fail threshold

  test users with correct column names and valid email address

- Add docker-compose.api-test.yml: MySQL + app + k6 compose file

Bug fixes found while making tests pass:
- Fix migration SQL: openid→open_id, unionid→union_id,
  jsapi_ticket→js_api_ticket to match GORM snake_case column generation
- Fix studyRecordService.Update: derive CourseID from UnitID via repo
  lookup instead of leaving it 0 (caused FK constraint violation)
- Fix provider.go: wire CourseUnitRepo into NewStudyRecordService
- Fix interaction_test.go: update test to supply MockCourseUnitRepository
- Fix seed + k6 test: use admin@example.com (admin@test.com rejected
  by govalidator IsEmail)

Add api-test job to .github/workflows/ci.yml that:
- depends on the unit test job via needs: test
- runs docker compose -f docker-compose.api-test.yml up
  --exit-code-from k6 --abort-on-container-exit
- always cleans up via docker compose down -v --remove-orphans

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add SetEnvKeyReplacer so nested APP_* env vars are read correctly

Viper's AutomaticEnv() upper-cases keys as-is, producing APP_DATABASE.HOST
(with a literal dot) instead of APP_DATABASE_HOST. Without a replacer, the
env var lookup always fails and the default value (localhost) is used.

Fix: v.SetEnvKeyReplacer(strings.NewReplacer(".", "_"))

Also adds config_test.go with tests for env-var-only and default-value loading.

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: mayday
repository.description: The app you hope you never get a notification from

commit.message:
feat: add complete Mayday iOS Xcode project

- Swift 6, SwiftUI, MVVM + async/await architecture
- iOS 17.0 minimum deployment target
- Two targets: Mayday app + MaydayLiveActivity widget extension
- Models: UserResponse, TokenPair, AppNotification, SessionResponse, AlertAttributes
- Services: HTTPClient (actor), AuthService, KeychainService, NotificationsAPIService, PushNotificationService
- ViewModels: AuthViewModel, NotificationsViewModel, SettingsViewModel
- Views: Login/Register/VerifyEmail, NotificationsList/Detail, Settings/ChangePassword/Sessions
- APNs push notifications with UIApplicationDelegate
- ActivityKit Live Activities for Dynamic Island + Lock Screen
- Keychain (Security framework) token storage
- 30-second polling with pagination for notifications
- Xcode project file (project.pbxproj) with correct build phases for both targets

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: scan report panel destroyed by updateLastScan textContent

Root cause: updateLastScan() used el.textContent which replaced ALL
child content including the scan-report-panel div. Now uses a text
node to update only the label text while preserving child elements.

Verified with Playwright: 14/14 tests pass — panel opens on click,
shows all 4 phases with status icons, task counts, retry info, error
details, duration, and warning indicator. Closes on second click.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
